apps.name: Nuvio Enhanced
apps.subtitle: Polished media browsing
apps.localizedDescription: A community-maintained build of NuvioMobile with focus on premium UX edits.

versions.localizedDescription:
Nuvio Enhanced 0.3.1 Build 102

**Nuvio Enhanced 0.3.1 Build 102**

**What’s New**
Added Favorite Actors. You can now add actors/people to favorites and access them quickly from your profile.
Added expanded Actor Pages with movies and series the person appeared in.
Added section arrows to actor/content sections so full lists can be opened on a separate page.
Added Search by Actor Name. Actor/person profiles now appear alongside movie and series search results.
Added experimental Download Notifications with progress, artwork, title info, and pause/resume/cancel actions.
Added background stream prefetch option in Enhanced settings.
Added AI Assistant settings/API fields to backup and restore.
Added improved subtitle language grouping. Cr: Russo #32 
Added redesigned Downloads experience inside Library.
Downloads now show as poster cards with progress, movie/show filters, and category filtering.
Added long-press actions for downloaded items: Play, Details, and Delete.
Downloaded content now saves richer title details for offline use.
Added subtitle font customization.
Added player overlay showing estimated media finish time.

**Improvements**
Improved stream loading flow by optionally starting stream fetching right after opening details.
Improved iOS 4K playback smoothness by enabling hardware decoder auto mode by default.
Improved player brightness handling so remembered brightness no longer causes app-level brightness locking/jumping.
Improved backup coverage for Enhanced/AI settings.
Improved actor/profile discovery from search and profile pages.
Improved download management visibility through system notifications.
Improved Downloads page layout by moving downloads into Library with clearer organization.
Improved poster long-press menus with blurred full-screen presentation and synopsis preview.
Improved profile poster loading and fallback artwork.
Improved Hero metadata loading speed and reliability.
Improved MDBList/rating display reliability.
Improved alternate app icon rendering.
Improved in-app update banner layout.
Improved stream selection synopsis handling with expandable long descriptions.
Improved player behavior when changing video quality.

**Fixes**
Fixed volume boost not actually increasing audio between 100–200%.
Fixed iOS brightness gesture stutter/jank caused by controller resets.
Fixed long synopsis blocking scrolling and preventing access to episode lists.
Fixed Upcoming profile counter showing 0 when future titles used non-ISO date formats.
Fixed brightness staying locked after player brightness changes.
Fixed downloaded-item action menu showing as a bottom sheet instead of the premium blur overlay.
Fixed bottom navigation showing behind the download action menu.
Fixed “Go to details” wording, now shown as Details.
Fixed poster/action overlay sizing issues.
Fixed Hero action overlap when ratings are hidden.
Fixed special episode next-up behavior.
Fixed Continue Watching row starting from the middle.
Fixed player speed/audio track changing unexpectedly after quality switch.
Fixed Enhanced settings sometimes resetting unexpectedly.
Fixed Android predictive-back related instability.
